name: Carrot-Raisin Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (moderate).
2. Grease a 9- by 13-inch baking pan.
3. Mix the sugar and fat in a bowl until well combined.
4. Add eggs and vanilla; beat until smooth.
5. Stir in dry ingredients, raisins, carrots, and walnuts.
6. Spread mixture into prepared baking pan.
7. Bake for about 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool before cutting into squares.
Calories per brownie: About 150
Source: FOOD -- by U.S. Department of Agriculture
